name: Interactive Fairytale Book
description:
A magical interactive fairytale book

This Fairytale book is a weird and magical book where you can actually get to choose what happens in the stories, who's the characters, in the fairytales, as well as how the story ends, After the story ends the user will be released back out of the book and the blanks will be cleared so they can enjoy the fairytales over and over again.
creator: Aerotheacrobatfan
